newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. 2026 guidance (revenue $560-580M, adj EPS $2.30-2.45) was set with FY25 results in February; M&A framework (60-80% of FCF) unchanged. The -1.0% move since June 9 is drift on a continued YTD re-rating (+49.7%).

sources.label: CTS 2026 guidance / margins / cash flow - StockTitan

verdicts.rankRationale: On the residual-alpha-vs-passives lens, the passive/power-sensing bottleneck thesis is intact with no fresh fundamental evidence since June 9. The continued YTD re-rating (+49.7%) without new news keeps eroding residual alpha on this crowding-sensitive list - small negative delta, but conviction and rank-2 placement hold.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowding/re-rating erodes residual alpha absent fresh catalysts
verdicts.bull: Direct passive + current-sensing supplier to data-center power, lower crowding than mega-caps, M&A optionality.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis intact but increasingly discovered; needs a fundamental print to re-extend the residual edge.
verdicts.bear: +49.7% YTD on no new news leaves little residual alpha; a soft print would compress the premium fast.

verdicts.rankRationale: On the latent under-covered supply-chain screen, the edge-sensing/thermal-monitoring/industrial-automation pathway has no new confirming or refuting evidence since June 9. This centrality screen is less crowding-sensitive than the alpha list, so the -1.0% drift is immaterial. Hold at 12.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Edge sensing / thermal monitoring pull from AI infrastructure
verdicts.primaryRisk: Latent pathway remains 'could support', not yet confirmed in numbers
verdicts.bull: Sensors, filters, connectivity components map cleanly onto edge-sensing and thermal-monitoring needs.
verdicts.neutral: Plausible latent node but unconfirmed; story flat since June 9.
verdicts.bear: AI linkage stays indirect; industrial/auto cyclicality dominates the actual revenue mix.
